arts.ttl: Revealed: Manchester United battling Arsenal for LETHAL striker signing
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to join the race for the transfer of Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic, who has also been on Arsenal’s radar. The Serbia international scored for Juve last night as the Serie A giants earned a 2-0 win over Manchester City in the Champions League. arts.ttl: Man Utd could sell Garnacho and Mainoo amid major PSR threat
arts.sum: Offloading one of their “crown jewels” is something that the Red Devils want to avoid, and instead they have formed another plan to sell Rashford on a cut-price deal. Manchester United are desperately trying to sell Marcus Rashford in order to protect their two “crown jewels” of Kobbie Mainoo and Alejandro Garnacho .
